title: Baseline
description: Reference Period, time or measure against which the Information is assessed or compared.

definitions.definition: Reference Period, time or measure against which the Information is assessed or compared.
Source data that has been processed to a common set of requirements and organised into a form that allows immediate analysis and interoperability through time and with other collections.
definitions.sources: - WGISS Shared Collection Lifecycle Management Principles for Earth Observation Data
